engine.gatekeeper.handle_hachimi_all: Hand all off to Hachimi for an hour
engine.gatekeeper.hachimi_activated: 🐱 You activated Hachimi. It will handle this tool for the next %d minutes, enjoy your time!
engine.gatekeeper.shut_up_msg: ⚠️ You muted this tool call. It will automatically allow for the next %d minutes in tool call `%q`.
engine.gatekeeper.continue_all_msg: ⚠️ You allowed all tool calls in this session! They will automatically allow for the next 10 minutes.
engine.gatekeeper.cancel_all_msg: ❌ You rejected all tool calls in this session! They will automatically deny for the next 10 minutes.
engine.gatekeeper.hachimi_unsafe: 🐱⚠️ **Hachimi thinks this tool call is unsafe! Please review it carefully and decide.**
engine.gatekeeper.hachimi_suspicious: **Hachimi thinks this tool call is suspicious! Please review it carefully and decide.**
engine.gatekeeper.hachimi_handled: 🐱✅ Hachimi thinks this tool call is safe to go so it grants permission.
